title: Adding Persian Caalender
excerpt:
Hi. We use a different official calendar in Iran. It is called Hijri-Shamsi. I think it would be great if you add this format in your date structures for engaging more customers. 
Thanks for your attention.

posts.author: tabibz (Mohammed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. We use a different official calendar in Iran. It is called Hijri-Shamsi. I think it would be great if you add this format in your date structures for engaging more customers.

Thanks for your attention.
